He was a key figure in the British military leadership and played a significant role in planning and executing military operations during World War I. Given that Operation Michael was a major British military operation, it is likely that Sir William Robertson was involved in its planning and execution. Therefore, I believe that Sir William Robertson was the Quartermaster General involved in Operation Michael.</think>
<answer> Sir William Robertson </answer>
